title: How SkillSwap Works
subtitle: A peer-to-peer skill exchange where every trade is fair, verifiable, and recorded on Cardano.

sections.heading: The Idea
sections.body:
SkillSwap is built on one principle: **teach what you know, learn what you don't** — no money changing hands for the skills themselves.

You list what you can *teach* and what you want to *learn*. The network finds people whose needs mirror yours, you exchange knowledge directly, and each completed exchange leaves behind a **verifiable proof** anchored on the Cardano blockchain.

sections.heading: 1. Set Your Skills
sections.body:
Connect your Cardano wallet and declare two things:

- **What you can teach** — the skills you're confident sharing.
- **What you want to learn** — the skills you're looking for.

Your profile is your position in the network. A connected wallet is required — it's how you sign in, secure your messages, and prove your exchanges.

sections.heading: 2. Find a Match
sections.body:
The matching engine only surfaces **bidirectional matches** — people who teach what you want *and* want what you teach.

> No one-sided connections. Every match is a fair trade by design.

A `Perfect Match` is someone whose teach/learn skills mirror yours exactly. A `Strong Match` overlaps on at least one skill in each direction.

sections.heading: 3. Request a Swap
sections.body:
When you find someone to trade with, you send a swap request and pay a small **2 ADA platform fee**.

This fee keeps SkillSwap sustainable and filters out low-effort requests — but it's designed to never punish you for reaching out:

- If the other person **declines**, you're refunded the **full 2 ADA**, automatically.
- You only ever part with the fee when an exchange actually goes ahead.

The payment is verified **instantly** — we read your signed transaction directly, so there's no waiting for on-chain confirmation before your request is sent.

sections.heading: 4. Exchange Skills
sections.body:
Once your match **accepts**, the swap becomes active and a private, **end-to-end encrypted** conversation opens between you.

Both sides:

1. Share their skill and any deliverables.
2. Confirm completion independently.

A swap only completes when **both** parties have delivered and confirmed — no single person controls the outcome.

sections.heading: 5. Earn Your Proof
sections.body:
When both sides confirm, SkillSwap generates a **deterministic proof** of the exchange — the participants, the skills traded, and a content hash.

You then anchor that proof on Cardano with a single signed transaction. The result is a permanent, independently verifiable record that the exchange happened:

`PENDING → ANCHORING → ANCHORED`

The proof belongs to you. Anyone can re-hash the stored details and check them against the on-chain record.

sections.heading: The Swap Fee, Explained
sections.body:
The 2 ADA fee moves through clear states so you always know where your money is:

- **Paid** — you requested the swap and the fee is confirmed.
- **Kept** — the match accepted (or you cancelled); the fee sustains the platform.
- **Refunded** — the match declined; your 2 ADA was returned in full.

Every refund is re-checked on-chain before it's issued, so a refund is always backed by a real, confirmed payment. You can see the live status on each swap and in your dashboard.

sections.heading: Why Cardano
sections.body:
Every meaningful action is backed by real cryptography:

- **Wallet sign-in** proves who you are without passwords.
- **The swap fee and its refund** are real on-chain transactions.
- **Your proof of exchange** is anchored on-chain and verifiable by anyone, forever.

SkillSwap doesn't just *say* an exchange happened — it lets you prove it. [Get started](/login) and make your first trade.
